job_summary: A Clinical Trial Site Manager is responsible for the overall management and performance of clinical trials at a site, ensuring timelines, quality, and compliance are met.
key_responsibilities: Oversee end-to-end clinical trial operations at the site
Manage site staff, investigators, and coordinators
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
Monitor site performance metrics (recruitment, data quality, timelines)
Coordinate with sponsors, CROs, and regulatory bodies
career_path: Site Manager → Clinical Trial Manager → Operations Head
skills_required: coordinate with sponsors, cros, and regulatory bodies
manage site staff, investigators, and coordinators
monitor site performance metrics (recruitment, data quality, timelines)
oversee end-to-end clinical trial operations at the site
